Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class SaltAndPepper extends Transformer Randomly change values in a double matrix to 0.0 or 255.0. This actor reads in a double matrix

0.0 or 255.0. This actor reads in a double matrix and then randomly changes some of the matrix elements to 0.0 or to 255.0. Some of the elements remain unchanged. If the double matrix represents an image, then the image would appear to have Salt a

image, then the image would appear to have Salt and Pepper scattered on it. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: SaltAndPepper.java,v 1.12 2004/04/13 05:12:15 cxh Exp $ Author: James Yeh, Contributor: Christopher Hylands Brooks See Also: Serialized F

ropagateValue Methods inherited from interface ptolemy.kernel.util. Nameable description , getFullName , getName , getName Field Detail probability public Parameter probability The probability that a pixel will be turned black or white. This parame

pixel will be turned black or white. This parameter contains a double between 0.0 and 1.0, the initial default value is 0.1. With the initial default value of 0.1, then there is a 5% chance a pixel will be turned white, a 5% chance that the

ixel will be turned white, a 5% chance that the pixel will be turned black and a 90% chance that the pixel will remain unchanged. Constructor Detail SaltAndPepper public SaltAndPepper ( CompositeEntity container, java.lang.St
